**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jilin Qinghui Zhizao Automobile Parts Co., Ltd. is a classic example of an active, legacy small-scale manufacturing workshop with deep roots in the FAW Group ecosystem. Established in 1990 in Jilin City, AI data recovery unveiled a fascinating historical trajectory hidden in shifted columns: it evolved from the 'Yucai Machining Factory attached to the Vocational High School of the First Auto Works (FAW) Standard Parts Factory', later becoming the 'FAW Sihuan Jilin Standard Parts Factory'. This confirms its original DNA as a vocational school-affiliated workshop producing basic standard hardware (nuts, bolts) for FAW. Despite modernizing its name to include 'Zhizao' (Intelligent Manufacturing), the data shows it remains a traditional physical factory: it has a 5.6M RMB paid-in capital and employs 26 insured workers in 2024 (recovered from the organization_code). It currently operates as an active Tier-3/4 subcontractor providing basic auto parts and mechanical machining services.
